title.en: Ye Tian had already come to the other end of th...

content.en:
Now.

Ye Tian had already come to the other end of the rift.

At this time.

Incomparably chaotic energy is surging, and the oppressive power here is terrifying, and it is difficult for perception to spread.

Darkness, nothingness, emptiness, chaos, horror.

This was Ye Tian's first feeling.

"What is this place?"

This is something that Ye Tian is very curious about.

The rules here are not the same as those on the Eternal Side, so this is certainly not the Land of the Eternal Other.

Other than that.

This should not be a place like a small world or a small space, but an incomparably vast world, and the rules here seem to be more powerful.

But it certainly has a different connection to the land beyond eternity.

"Let the Innocent Demon Vine copy the body and go in completely, and then move slowly and explore this place!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately.

Ye Tian's Innocent Demon Vine Replica Body completely shuttled in, the suppression here is very large, the shuttle space cannot be done, and the speed of flight will be very slow, just like the life that has just flew.

Subsequently.

He began to explore it slowly.

He estimated that there must be danger here, otherwise the Innocent Demon Vine might have already stepped here and survived here.

"Is there also a crack passage that leads to this place from the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was thinking about this question.

If so, those Cursed Dragons may have entered the Land of the Swinging Sea from here, replenishing the number of Cursed Dragons in the Land of the Swinging Sea.

But if it was Tai'er Cursed Dragon why he had to stay in the land of the sea, this was his puzzle.

There are no creatures in the vicinity, nothing has been found.

However, he soon discovered a large number of creatures.

These creatures resemble a giant in appearance, with a red body and hideous faces, but each of them is quite good.

Most of them have the cultivation of the Origin Middle Realm, and among them, there are also the existence of the Origin Upper Realm, and there are also two Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Upon approaching them, the copy talent sensed their talents and learned their names.

【Red Skull Giant】

To his shock, these red-skulled giants were carrying a palace.

Suddenly.

This team of Red Skull giants found Ye Tian and stopped one by one.

Immediately after, a group of Red Skull giants fell to their knees and stacked on top of each other to form a staircase that lay in front of the palace.

Click!

The palace opens.

A pitch-black creature came out of it, he was in human form, but his body exuded an incomparably terrifying aura.

"At the very least, it's comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened six times!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The creature stepped on the massive steps of the Red Skull Giant Star, and walked down step by step.

This appearance is undoubtedly very domineering.

I have to say that Ye Tian can't enjoy such treatment.

Tianshan Pavilion can't find so many Origin Realm overlords who are like slaves to be steps for themselves and let themselves appear!

"A plant-based Origin Upper Realm Overlord Life, it's very rare, grab it, I'm going to make it my pet !!!"

The creature shouted.

And at this time, Ye Tian also knew the name of this lifeform through the copying talent.

Blood Howl

Moreover, he also knew about the race of the Blood Howl, the Reincarnation Celestial Clan!

In an instant.

Those two Origin Upper Realm Overlord-level Red Skeleton Giants made a move and killed towards Ye Tian.

Ye Tian is now a copy of the Innocent Demon Vine, naturally he can't beat these two Red Skull Giants, so he directly chose to blow himself up!

He didn't want to be this blood howling pet, not even if he copied his body.

......

"Judging from the situation just explored, there is an incomparably vast world behind this rift, and ordinary Origin Upper Realm Overlords don't know at all, and the news has been blocked by those ancient existences. This piece of heaven and earth should be very powerful, and you can casually encounter the Origin Upper Realm Overlord comparable to the Six Awakenings, and there should be many Origin Upper Realm Overlords over there!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course.

What shocked him the most was that the two Red Skeleton Giants at the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level were willing to be the slaves of that blood howl, which was placed on the other side of eternity, it would be too nonsense!

Like the nine top overlord-level forces in the land of eternity, there are not many Origin Upper Realm overlords, among any of the forces, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord is the top position, enjoying the worship of countless powerhouses.

But in that mysterious place, he became a slave.

If you say it, I'm afraid no one will believe it.

"You have to copy another copy body, but it can't be a copy of the Innocent Demon Vine, just copy the Red Skull Giant at the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level!"

Subsequently.

He began to copy the body of the Red Skull Giant, and soon succeeded in copying it.

Afterwards.

He entered the area as a copy of the Red Skull Giant and began to explore it.

Of course.

He was also afraid of running into a blood howl, so he changed directions to explore.

It didn't take long for him to encounter the second Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, whose strength was about comparable to that of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened five times, and it was a female Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

This reincarnation celestial clan was not followed by any Red Skull Giant.

But Ye Tian was targeted by her.

"You don't even have the Reincarnation Celestial Controller on you, where did you escape, and from today on, you are mine!"

This reincarnation celestial clan sacrificed a black ring in his hand and flew directly to Ye Tian's neck.

Ye Tian instinctively wanted to resist, but when he thought of exploring intelligence, he didn't resist.

I saw that this black ring directly locked the neck of Ye Tian's copy body and blended into it.

Then.

Ye Tian found that his increased body was controlled by this female reincarnation celestial clan.

In fact, those Red Skull Giant slaves under Blood Howl were also controlled, but when Ye Tian copied the Red Skull Giant's body, he did not copy this black ring.

But without the black ring, there is no escape from being controlled.

Obviously, the Red Skull Giant has a very low status here.

"After you get familiar with this place, you have to copy a reincarnation celestial clan to copy the body, so that you can have a very high status!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He followed behind the female reincarnation celestial clan and left here.

Through copying talent, Ye Tian also knew the name of this female reincarnation celestial clan - Swallow Xi!

It didn't take long.

Ye Tian followed Tunxi to an incomparably huge ancient giant city, the material of this giant city was very unusual, even the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm could not destroy the walls of this giant city.

And.

There is also an incomparably terrifying large array here, even he can't understand it at all, and the mysteries of its magic circle surpass any magic circle on the other side of eternity.
